description: PR2 scenario #7 — heuristic mismatch (observational). A 2-credit meeting that runs 100 minutes (08:00 → 09:40). timetable_rooming.py:305 classifies rooms as lab when 'duration > 80 and cr == 4'; this section has cr == 2 (not 4) so the guard lets it proceed — but timetable_autoplace.py:1008/1131 use is_lab_course + duration > 80 which would classify it differently. The oracle observes the divergence and emits ROOM_HEURISTIC_MISMATCH with context identifying which dimensions diverged. PR2 does NOT change the placement — it only surfaces the mismatch count so a future PR can retire the heuristic with measured impact data.
notes: This reason code is the keystone of the PR2 'surface not replace' philosophy: the heuristic stays in place (rooming and autoplace keep their own divergent flavours) and PR2 just *measures* how often the two disagree. Once the measured rate is available in production, a later PR can replace the heuristic with a proper room-type resolver informed by real data.
Observation only — unlike the other six reasons, this fires even on a successfully-placed section.
